creator: joerg@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The HP6020 is supported.  In FreeBSD 2.2.x, you are supposed to pretend 
it to be an HP4020 in the `wormcontrol select' statememnt.  In FreeBSD- 
current, Jean-Marc made this decision automatic anyway, the wormcontrol 
select is gone now.
